sent_simp: 仓库里的存货已经不多了。
sent_trad: 倉庫裡的存貨已經不多了。
pinyin: Cāngkù lǐ de cúnhuò yǐjīng bù duō le.
english: There isn't much inventory left in the warehouse.

sent_simp: 这些水果的总称是热带水果。
sent_trad: 這些水果的總稱是熱帶水果。
pinyin: Zhèxiē shuǐguǒ de zǒngchēng shì rèdài shuǐguǒ.
english: The generic term for these fruits is tropical fruit.

sent_simp: 政府宣布开始新一轮征兵。
sent_trad: 政府宣布開始新一輪征兵。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ xuānbù kāishǐ xīn yī lún zhēngbīng.
english: The government announced the start of a new round of military recruitment.

sent_simp: 他感到这件事已经无望了。
sent_trad: 他感到這件事已經無望了。
pinyin: Tā gǎndào zhè jiàn shì yǐjīng wúwàng le.
english: He felt that this matter was already hopeless.

sent_simp: 新闻界对这件事非常关注。
sent_trad: 新聞界對這件事非常關注。
pinyin: Xīnwénjiè duì zhè jiàn shì fēicháng guānzhù.
english: The press paid close attention to this matter.

sent_simp: 大家争先报名参加比赛。
sent_trad: 大家爭先報名參加比賽。
pinyin: Dàjiā zhēngxiān bàomíng cānjiā bǐsài.
english: Everyone rushed to sign up for the competition.

sent_simp: 下班后我喜欢坐着放空一会儿。
sent_trad: 下班後我喜歡坐著放空一會兒。
pinyin: Xiàbān hòu wǒ xǐhuān zuòzhe fàngkōng yīhuìr.
english: After work I like to sit and empty my mind for a while.

sent_simp: 邮件里附上了合同文件。
sent_trad: 郵件裡附上了合同文件。
pinyin: Yóujiàn lǐ fùshàng le hétong wénjiàn.
english: The contract document is attached to the email.

sent_simp: 具体操作请参阅使用说明书。
sent_trad: 具體操作請參閱使用說明書。
pinyin: Jùtǐ cāozuò qǐng cānyuè shǐyòng shuōmíngshū.
english: For specific operations, please refer to the user manual.

sent_simp: 医生建议定期检查是否感染性病。
sent_trad: 醫生建議定期檢查是否感染性病。
pinyin: Yīshēng jiànyì dìngqī jiǎnchá shìfǒu gǎnrǎn xìngbìng.
english: The doctor recommends regular check-ups for sexually transmitted diseases.

sent_simp: 这款产品有三种型式可以选择。
sent_trad: 這款產品有三種型式可以選擇。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chǎnpǐn yǒu sān zhǒng xíngshì kěyǐ xuǎnzé.
english: This product comes in three types to choose from.

sent_simp: 新员工需要受训两周才能上岗。
sent_trad: 新員工需要受訓兩週才能上崗。
pinyin: Xīn yuángōng xūyào shòuxùn liǎng zhōu cái néng shànggǎng.
english: New employees need two weeks of training before they can start work.

sent_simp: 警察把他说的话全部记入笔录。
sent_trad: 警察把他說的話全部記入筆錄。
pinyin: Jǐngchá bǎ tā shuō de huà quánbù jì rù bǐlù.
english: The police put everything he said into the written record.

sent_simp: 金融危机导致很多人失业。
sent_trad: 金融危機導致很多人失業。
pinyin: Jīnróng wēijī dǎozhì hěn duō rén shīyè.
english: The financial crisis caused many people to lose their jobs.

sent_simp: 主队以三比零轻取对手。
sent_trad: 主隊以三比零輕取對手。
pinyin: Zhǔduì yǐ sān bǐ líng qīngqǔ duìshǒu.
english: The home team beat their opponents easily three to zero.

sent_simp: 这首歌被一代代人传唱至今。
sent_trad: 這首歌被一代代人傳唱至今。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu gē bèi yīdài dài rén chuánchàng zhìjīn.
english: This song has been passed down and sung from generation to generation.

sent_simp: 图书馆位于街道的西端。
sent_trad: 圖書館位於街道的西端。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn wèiyú jiēdào de xīduān.
english: The library is located at the western end of the street.

sent_simp: 邻里之间应该互相帮助。
sent_trad: 鄰里之間應該互相幫助。
pinyin: Línlǐ zhījiān yīnggāi hùxiāng bāngzhù.
english: Neighbors should help each other.

sent_simp: 早期发现乳腺癌治愈率很高。
sent_trad: 早期發現乳腺癌治癒率很高。
pinyin: Zǎoqī fāxiàn rǔxiàn'ái zhìyù lǜ hěn gāo.
english: When breast cancer is detected early, the cure rate is very high.

sent_simp: 川菜是中国最受欢迎的菜系之一。
sent_trad: 川菜是中國最受歡迎的菜系之一。
pinyin: Chuāncài shì Zhōngguó zuì shòu huānyíng de càixì zhī yī.
english: Sichuan cuisine is one of the most popular regional cuisines in China.

sent_simp: 感恩节那天他们烤了一只火鸡。
sent_trad: 感恩節那天他們烤了一隻火雞。
pinyin: Gǎn'ēnjié nà tiān tāmen kǎo le yī zhī huǒjī.
english: On Thanksgiving they roasted a turkey.

sent_simp: 他总是记不住这个单词的拼写。
sent_trad: 他總是記不住這個單詞的拼寫。
pinyin: Tā zǒng shì jì bu zhù zhège dāncí de pīnxiě.
english: He can never remember how to spell this word.

sent_simp: 她的表亲从外地来看望她。
sent_trad: 她的表親從外地來看望她。
pinyin: Tā de biǎoqīn cóng wàidì lái kànwàng tā.
english: Her cousin came from out of town to visit her.

sent_simp: 他毕业后在高校做了两年博士后。
sent_trad: 他畢業後在高校做了兩年博士後。
pinyin: Tā bìyè hòu zài gāoxiào zuò le liǎng nián bóshìhòu.
english: After graduating he did a two-year postdoc at a university.

sent_simp: 她经常在博客上发表随笔。
sent_trad: 她經常在博客上發表隨筆。
pinyin: Tā jīngcháng zài bókè shàng fābiǎo suíbǐ.
english: She often posts personal essays on her blog.

sent_simp: 这道题需要用最优化方法来求解。
sent_trad: 這道題需要用最優化方法來求解。
pinyin: Zhè dào tí xūyào yòng zuìyōuhuà fāngfǎ lái qiújiě.
english: This problem needs to be solved using optimization methods.

sent_simp: 公司优先录用应届毕业生。
sent_trad: 公司優先錄用應屆畢業生。
pinyin: Gōngsī yōuxiān lùyòng yīngjiè bìyèshēng.
english: The company gives priority to hiring this year's graduates.

sent_simp: 超市里的干货区卖各种蘑菇和虾米。
sent_trad: 超市裡的乾貨區賣各種蘑菇和蝦米。
pinyin: Chāoshì lǐ de gānhuò qū mài gèzhǒng mógū hé xiāmǐ.
english: The dried goods section of the supermarket sells all kinds of mushrooms and dried shrimp.

sent_simp: 他跳槽是为了找一份高薪工作。
sent_trad: 他跳槽是為了找一份高薪工作。
pinyin: Tā tiàocáo shì wèile zhǎo yī fèn gāoxīn gōngzuò.
english: He changed jobs in order to find a higher-paying position.

sent_simp: 请核对一下药品上的批号。
sent_trad: 請核對一下藥品上的批號。
pinyin: Qǐng héduì yīxià yàopǐn shàng de pīhào.
english: Please check the batch number on the medicine.

sent_simp: 他学的是重剑，不是花剑。
sent_trad: 他學的是重劍，不是花劍。
pinyin: Tā xué de shì zhòngjiàn, bù shì huājiàn.
english: He practices épée, not foil.

sent_simp: 他因为家里穷不得不辍学打工。
sent_trad: 他因為家裡窮不得不輟學打工。
pinyin: Tā yīnwèi jiālǐ qióng bùdébù chuòxué dǎgōng.
english: He had to drop out of school to work because his family was poor.

sent_simp: 她分不清
和
是什么代词。
sent_trad: 她分不清「他」和「她」是什麼代詞。
pinyin: Tā fēn bu qīng
hé
shì shénme dàicí.
english: She can't tell what kind of pronouns "he" and "she" are.

sent_simp: 两人虽然性格不同，却有很多共同点。
sent_trad: 兩人雖然性格不同，卻有很多共同點。
pinyin: Liǎng rén suīrán xìnggé bùtóng, què yǒu hěn duō gòngtóngdiǎn.
english: Although the two have different personalities, they have a lot in common.

sent_simp: 她把新买的笔记本电脑带到了公司。
sent_trad: 她把新買的筆記本電腦帶到了公司。
pinyin: Tā bǎ xīn mǎi de bǐjìběn diànnǎo dài dào le gōngsī.
english: She brought her newly bought laptop to the office.

sent_simp: 老师讲解了几个常用的句式。
sent_trad: 老師講解了幾個常用的句式。
pinyin: Lǎoshī jiǎngjiě le jǐ gè chángyòng de jùshì.
english: The teacher explained several commonly used sentence patterns.

sent_simp: 我们穿过一条小巷找到了那家店。
sent_trad: 我們穿過一條小巷找到了那家店。
pinyin: Wǒmen chuānguò yī tiáo xiǎoxiàng zhǎodào le nà jiā diàn.
english: We went through an alley to find that shop.

sent_simp: 这张照片的构图非常有层次感。
sent_trad: 這張照片的構圖非常有層次感。
pinyin: Zhè zhāng zhàopiàn de gòutú fēicháng yǒu céngcì gǎn.
english: The composition of this photo has a strong sense of depth.

sent_simp: 周末的集市上卖的东西很多。
sent_trad: 週末的集市上賣的東西很多。
pinyin: Zhōumò de jíshì shàng mài de dōngxi hěn duō.
english: There are many things for sale at the weekend market.

sent_simp: 船慢慢地开始下沉了。
sent_trad: 船慢慢地開始下沉了。
pinyin: Chuán màn man de kāishǐ xiàchén le.
english: The boat started to slowly sink.
